title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, list models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; same API surface as the Python client.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package to use Ollama models as LLMs or embedders inside LangChain pipelines.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Clean open-source ChatGPT-style web UI that talks to a local Ollama instance; no data leaves your machine.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Interactive TUI (Rust) for browsing, pulling and chatting with Ollama models from the terminal.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS-Code extension that turns Ollama into a free local GitHub Copilot alternative with inline completions.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin SDK for Ollama; chat, generate, pull, list, delete models inside JVM applications.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Community-maintained Ruby gem wrapping the Ollama REST API with idiomatic Ruby syntax.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET library and CLI for Ollama; supports chat, embeddings, model management and real-time streaming.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU autoscaling and PVC model cache.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Lightweight multi-arch Docker image (cpu & cuda) plus compose stacks for one-command local LLM serving.

title: ollama-embeddings
summary: Minimal Python package that exposes Ollama embedding endpoints compatible with sentence-transformers.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack 2.x integration letting you use Ollama models as generators or embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hosted Discord bot that chats, brainstorms and answers questions powered by any Ollama model.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Lightweight Slack bot (Go) that adds /ollama slash command to query local models privately.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that brings local LLM summarization, continuation and Q&A directly inside your vault.

title: ollama-ray
summary: Ray Serve example showing how to scale Ollama models horizontally across a Ray cluster with autoscaling.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Ready-to-run Retrieval-Augmented-Generation repo using Ollama + Chroma + LangChain to chat with your documents.

title: ollama-function-calling
summary: Experimental branch demonstrating structured tool use and function calling with Mistral and Llama models in Ollama.
